sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87457" key="proe/yhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προ-έψησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n87457.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">previous boiling</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stewing,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg001:130" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.130</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
